libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property setup is indicated. Prefer in-memory tests for XML/property/method classes and simple fake servlet request/response objects rather than relying on a live WebDAV server.

deterministic_setup.reason: The artifact contains WebDAV request/response, input/output context, and AbstractWebdavServlet classes whose public APIs reference javax.servlet and javax.servlet.http types; the Maven artifact declares servlet-api as provided, so it is not supplied transitively to tests.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The library was compiled against an old provided servlet API; use javax.servlet-era APIs, not jakarta.servlet.
Some native-image failures may still be metadata/reflection issues unrelated to setup; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jackrabbit WebDAV exposes servlet-based server APIs, and its POM marks the servlet API as provided, so generated tests need an explicit test dependency to compile and exercise meaningful servlet-facing coverage.
